Internal legal memorandum — Velorise Holdings Ltd. (SGX-ST Mainboard; Ticker: VEL0; UEN 201912345K)
Subject: Proposed acquisition of OrchidPay Pte. Ltd. (UEN 202045678Z) and related employment/PDPA considerations; Board review under SFA/SGX disclosure controls.
Indicative offer price S$1.42 per share and expected completion in Q4 FY2026 constitute MNPI under the SFA; embargo until 17:30 SGT, 28 Jun 2026 pursuant to SGX Listing Manual Rule 703.
Deal team lead: Mr. Adrian Khoo, c/o Velorise Legal, adrian.khoo@velorise.com.sg, +65 6100 2211; role-only contact: Company Secretary, cosec@velorise.com.sg.
For KYC at the arranger bank, Mr. Adrian Khoo (Passport No. K9876543Q) and Ms. Liora Tan (FIN G1234567N) will provide certified copies; do not forward outside the Deal Room.
HR onboarding at OrchidPay requires NRIC/FIN collection—template field “NRIC/FIN: S1234567A” is a placeholder with an invalid checksum and must not be retained.
General enquiries 1800 000 0000 is a public helpline and not personal data; similarly, “Account No.: 00000000” on forms is a generic label.
Transfer of undertakings will trigger consent/notification to employees and contractors; role-only titles (e.g., HR Manager, CFO) may be used in notices without naming individuals.
Pre-sound investors under wall-crossing will sign PDPA-compliant NDAs; any pricing ranges or break fees discussed constitute MNPI even if circulated verbally.
Acquisition escrow to be opened at East Harbor Bank (SG), account 123-456-789-0 in the name of Velorise Holdings Ltd.; treasury contact ap@velorise.com.sg.
Do not collect copies of physical NRICs except as permitted by PDPC Advisory; mask addresses to block level only (e.g., 15 Veloria Lane, #12-01, Singapore 999999) in drafts.
The vendor’s public help desk help@orchidpay.com and +65 6100 0000 are not MNPI; avoid mixing with deal correspondence.
Maintain access logs in iBunker DMS; delete “Name: ______” form scans lacking purpose and confirm retention schedule (12 months for unsuccessful candidates).
Prepare holding statement referencing “Project Kestrel” without figures; high-level market commentary may be included if not linked to the offer.
Board approval will be by circular resolution; declarations of interest to note Ms. Tan’s unvested employee options in VEL0 (fict.) under the company’s ESOP.
